net.milkbowl.vault2.economy

Class EconomyFutures

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.milkbowl.vault2.economy.EconomyFutures

  • public final class EconomyFutures
extends Object
    Provides a wrapper for the synchronous methods of Economy and the asynchronous methods of AsyncEconomy. If the Economy.async() method is provided for this method attempts to perform the operation asynchronously if, otherwise, it falls back to a synchronous operation.
    Since:
    2.20
    Author:
    creatorfromhell

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String currency)
      Checks asynchronously if the specified account supports the given currency.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull String world)
      Checks if the specified account supports the given currency in the provided world.
      static CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithAccessTo(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, AccountPermission... permissions)
      Retrieves a list of account IDs that have been granted specific permissions to access a given account within the context of the specified plugin.
      static CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithMembershipTo(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Retrieves a list of account IDs that have a membership to the specified plugin name for the given account ID.
      static CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithOwnerOf(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Retrieves a list of account IDs that are owned by the same owner as the specified account ID.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Adds a member to an existing account in the economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid, AccountPermission... initialPermissions)
      Adds a member to the specified account with the given permissions.
      static CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Retrieves the balance of a specific account within a given economy plugin.
      static CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world)
      Retrieves the balance of the specified account in the given world using the provided Economy instance.
      static CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency)
      Retrieves the balance for a specific account in a specified world and currency.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if a deposit of the specified amount can be made into the given account.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if a deposit can be made into a specified account within the given economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Determines if the specified account is eligible to receive the specified deposit.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Determines if a specified amount can be withdrawn from a given account.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if a withdrawal of the specified amount can be made from the given account in the specified world.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if a withdrawal can be made from the specified account in the given world and currency.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name, boolean player)
      Creates an account in the given economy system with the specified parameters.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name, @NotNull String worldName, boolean player)
      Creates a new account using the provided Economy instance.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> createSharedAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name, @NotNull UUID owner)
      Creates a shared account within the specified economy provider.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> deleteAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Deletes an account associated with the given plugin name and account ID.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Deposits a specified amount into an account.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Deposits a specified amount of money into an account in the specified world.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Deposits a specified amount of currency into an account.
      static CompletableFuture<Optional<String>> getAccountName(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Retrieves the name of an account associated with the specified account ID.
      static CompletableFuture<Map<UUID,String>> getUUIDNameMap(@NotNull Economy economy)
      Retrieves a mapping of UUIDs to names using the provided Economy instance.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if a given account has a specified amount in the economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if the specified account has at least the given amount in the specified world using the provided economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks if the specified account has at least the specified amount of currency in the given world for the plugin's economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Checks asynchronously if an account exists in the provided economy system for the given account ID.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName)
      Checks asynchronously whether an account exists for the specified account ID and world name.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccountPermission(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull AccountPermission permission)
      Checks if a specific UUID has the given permission for the specified account under a plugin.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountMember(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Checks if a given UUID is a member of a specified account in the provided Economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountOwner(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Checks if the specified UUID corresponds to the owner of the account identified by the given account ID.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeAccountMember(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Removes a member from a specific account within the provided economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> renameAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name)
      Renames an existing account in the specified economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> renameAccount(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name)
      Renames an account in the given economy system.

      Sets the specified amount for the provided account ID within the given economy instance.

      Sets the economy balance for a specific account in a given world.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Sets the specified amount of the given currency for the specified account and world in the provided economy instance.
      static CompletableFuture<Boolean> setOwner(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Attempts to set an owner for a specified account in the provided economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID from, @NotNull UUID to, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously transfers a specified monetary amount from one user to another within the context of a given plugin.
      static CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID from, @NotNull UUID to, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously transfers a specific amount of currency from one account to another within the same world.
      static CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID from, @NotNull UUID to, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously transfers a specified amount of currency from one account to another within a specific world.

      Updates the permission of a specific account in the economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Withdraws a specified amount from the given account using the provided economy system.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Withdraws a specified amount from a player's account in the given economy and world.
      static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull Economy economy, @NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Initiates a withdrawal from a specified account with the given details.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • createAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String name,
                                                       boolean player)
        Creates an account in the given economy system with the specified parameters.
        Parameters:
        economy - The instance of the Economy system where the account will be created. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier for the account. Must not be null.
        name - The name to associate with the account. Must not be null.
        player - A boolean indicating whether the account is a player account or not.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account was successfully created, or false otherwise.

      • createAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String name,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String worldName,
                                                       boolean player)
        Creates a new account using the provided Economy instance.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance used to create the account; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier for the account to be created; must not be null
        name - the name of the account owner; must not be null
        worldName - the name of the world associated with the account; must not be null
        player - a boolean indicating whether the account belongs to a player
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account was successfully created, or false otherwise

      • getUUIDNameMap

        public static CompletableFuture<Map<UUID,String>> getUUIDNameMap(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull Economy economy)
        Retrieves a mapping of UUIDs to names using the provided Economy instance.
        Parameters:
        economy - The Economy instance used to retrieve the UUID-to-name map. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a map where the keys are UUIDs and the values are associated names.

      • getAccountName

        public static CompletableFuture<Optional<String>> getAccountName(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Retrieves the name of an account associated with the specified account ID.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance used to fetch the account name, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account whose name is to be retrieved, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an Optional with the account name if it exists, or an empty Optional otherwise

      • hasAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull
                                                    @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Checks asynchronously if an account exists in the provided economy system for the given account ID.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system instance used to verify the account. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account exists, false otherwise.

      • hasAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull
                                                    @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String worldName)
        Checks asynchronously whether an account exists for the specified account ID and world name.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance to query. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world where the account's existence is being verified. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account exists, or false otherwise.

      • renameAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> renameAccount(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String name)
        Renames an account in the given economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system where the account is managed. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to be renamed. Must not be null.
        name - The new name for the account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the operation was successful.

      • renameAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> renameAccount(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String name)
        Renames an existing account in the specified economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance to execute the renaming operation.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin making the request.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to be renamed.
        name - The new name to assign to the account.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the renaming operation was successful.

      • deleteAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> deleteAccount(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Deletes an account associated with the given plugin name and account ID.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance used to manage account operations. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin associated with the account. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to be deleted. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a boolean value. The boolean indicates whether the account was successfully deleted (true) or not (false).

      • accountSupportsCurrency

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String currency)
        Checks asynchronously if the specified account supports the given currency.
        Parameters:
        economy - The Economy instance used to perform the currency support check.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the check.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to be checked.
        currency - The currency to check support for.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a Boolean result: true if the account supports the specified currency, false otherwise.

      • accountSupportsCurrency

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String currency,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String world)
        Checks if the specified account supports the given currency in the provided world.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance used to perform the currency check. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin associated with the account. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to be checked. Must not be null.
        currency - The currency type to be checked for support. Must not be null.
        world - The name of the world where the account's currency support is to be verified. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture of Boolean indicating whether the account supports the specified currency in the given world.

      • balance

        public static CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull
                                                    @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Retrieves the balance of a specific account within a given economy plugin.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance managing the balances
        pluginName - the name of the plugin under which the account is maintained
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account whose balance is to be retrieved
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the balance of the specified account

      • balance

        public static CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull
                                                    @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String world)
        Retrieves the balance of the specified account in the given world using the provided Economy instance.
        Parameters:
        economy - The Economy instance used to perform the balance operation.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin invoking this method.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account for which the balance is being retrieved.
        world - The name of the world where the account's balance is being checked.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the balance of the account as a BigDecimal.

      • balance

        public static CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull
                                                    @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String world,
                                                    @NotNull
                                                    @NotNull String currency)
        Retrieves the balance for a specific account in a specified world and currency.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance used to fetch the balance
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the balance
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account
        world - the name of the world where the account is located
        currency - the currency type for the balance
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to the balance as a BigDecimal

      • has

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull
                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if a given account has a specified amount in the economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system being queried. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the request. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account being checked. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to check for in the account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that, when completed, indicates whether the specified account has at least the specified amount in the economy system.

      • has

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull
                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull String worldName,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if the specified account has at least the given amount in the specified world using the provided economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system to be used for the operation. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the operation. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world for which the operation is being performed. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to check if the account possesses. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a Boolean indicating whether the account has at least the specified amount.

      • has

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull
                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull String worldName,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull String currency,
                                             @NotNull
                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if the specified account has at least the specified amount of currency in the given world for the plugin's economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance used to perform the check
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the check
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to be checked
        worldName - the name of the world where the account exists
        currency - the currency in which the amount is to be checked
        amount - the minimum amount to check for
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account has at least the specified amount of the given currency, or false otherwise

      • set

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull
                                                     @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Sets the specified amount for the provided account ID within the given economy instance.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance to perform the operation on. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin invoking this operation. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account for which the amount is being set. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to set for the specified account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the result of the economy operation.

      • set

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull
                                                     @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull String worldName,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Sets the economy balance for a specific account in a given world.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy implementation to be used. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin invoking this method. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account whose balance is to be set. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world in which the account's balance is to be set. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to set as the account's balance. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the result of the balance set operation as an EconomyResponse.

      • set

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull
                                                     @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull String worldName,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull String currency,
                                                     @NotNull
                                                     @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Sets the specified amount of the given currency for the specified account and world in the provided economy instance.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance to perform the operation with, must not be null
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the operation, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account, must not be null
        worldName - the name of the world where the operation is applied, must not be null
        currency - the currency to be updated, must not be null
        amount - the amount to be set for the given currency, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the result of the operation as an EconomyResponse

      • transfer

        public static CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull
                                                               @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull UUID from,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull UUID to,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously transfers a specified monetary amount from one user to another within the context of a given plugin. The method ensures atomicity by attempting to revert the withdrawal if the deposit fails.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance to perform the check against
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the transfer; must not be null
        from - the unique identifier (UUID) of the user account from which the amount will be withdrawn; must not be null
        to - the unique identifier (UUID) of the user account to which the amount will be deposited; must not be null
        amount - the monetary amount to transfer; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an MultiEconomyResponse detailing the status of the transfer, including the final balances, success/failure type, and error messages (if any)

      • transfer

        public static CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull
                                                               @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull UUID from,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull UUID to,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull String worldName,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously transfers a specific amount of currency from one account to another within the same world. The transfer is performed as a withdrawal from the source account followed by a deposit into the target account. If the deposit operation fails, the withdrawn amount is refunded to the source account to ensure consistency.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance to perform the check against
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the transfer. Must not be null.
        from - The unique identifier of the sender's account. Must not be null.
        to - The unique identifier of the receiver's account. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world in which the transfer is taking place. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount of currency to transfer. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing an MultiEconomyResponse containing the details of the transfer result, including the amount transferred, the resulting balances for both accounts, and the operation status. If the transfer fails, it contains error details.

      • transfer

        public static CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull
                                                               @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull UUID from,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull UUID to,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull String worldName,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull String currency,
                                                               @NotNull
                                                               @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously transfers a specified amount of currency from one account to another within a specific world. The transfer involves withdrawing the amount from the source account and depositing it into the target account. If the deposit fails, the withdrawn amount is returned to the source account to ensure consistency.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance to perform the check against
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the transfer
        from - the unique identifier (UUID) of the source account
        to - the unique identifier (UUID) of the target account
        worldName - the name of the world in which the transfer is taking place
        currency - the name of the currency being transferred
        amount - the amount of currency to transfer
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an MultiEconomyResponse containing information about the result of the transfer, including success status, balances, and error messages if applicable

      • canWithdraw

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Determines if a specified amount can be withdrawn from a given account.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance to perform the check against
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the check
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check
        amount - the amount to be checked for withdrawal capability
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the result of the withdrawal capability check as an EconomyResponse

      • canWithdraw

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String worldName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if a withdrawal of the specified amount can be made from the given account in the specified world.
        Parameters:
        economy - The Economy instance used to check the withdrawal capability.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal check.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check.
        worldName - The name of the world where the withdrawal is being checked.
        amount - The amount to be checked for withdrawal eligibility.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to an EconomyResponse containing the result of the withdrawal check.

      • canWithdraw

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String worldName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String currency,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if a withdrawal can be made from the specified account in the given world and currency.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy implementation to use for performing the check.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal check.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check withdrawal eligibility for.
        worldName - The name of the world where the withdrawal is intended to occur.
        currency - The currency in which the withdrawal is requested.
        amount - The amount to be withdrawn.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to an EconomyResponse indicating whether the withdrawal is allowed and additional details (e.g., reason if not possible).

      • withdraw

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Withdraws a specified amount from the given account using the provided economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system handling the transaction. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the transaction. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account from which the amount will be withdrawn. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to withdraw from the account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the result of the withdrawal operation, encapsulated in an EconomyResponse.

      • withdraw

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String worldName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Withdraws a specified amount from a player's account in the given economy and world.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system where the withdrawal will be performed. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin performing the transaction. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier (UUID) of the account holder. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world where the transaction occurs. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to be withdrawn from the account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the result of the withdrawal operation as an EconomyResponse.

      • withdraw

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String worldName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String currency,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Initiates a withdrawal from a specified account with the given details.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy instance used to handle the withdrawal transaction
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account from which the withdrawal will occur
        worldName - the name of the world context for the transaction
        currency - the type of currency involved in the transaction
        amount - the amount of currency to be withdrawn
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the result of the withdrawal in the form of an EconomyResponse

      • canDeposit

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull
                                                            @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if a deposit of the specified amount can be made into the given account.
        Parameters:
        economy - The instance of the Economy system to be used for the deposit check. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the deposit check. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account into which the deposit is being checked. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to be deposited. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the result of the deposit check as an EconomyResponse.

      • canDeposit

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull
                                                            @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String worldName,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks if a deposit can be made into a specified account within the given economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance to handle the deposit check. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the deposit operation. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check for deposit eligibility. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world where the deposit operation will occur. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to be deposited. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing an EconomyResponse indicating whether the deposit can be made and, if not, the reason for failure.

      • canDeposit

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull
                                                            @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String worldName,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String currency,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Determines if the specified account is eligible to receive the specified deposit.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance used to process the deposit validation.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the transaction.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check.
        worldName - The name of the world where the transaction is taking place.
        currency - The currency used for the deposit.
        amount - The amount of money to be deposited.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing an EconomyResponse object indicating whether the account can receive the deposit, along with relevant status and message details.

      • deposit

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Deposits a specified amount into an account.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance handling the deposit operation. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the deposit. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to deposit into. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to be deposited. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the result of the deposit operation as an EconomyResponse.

      • deposit

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String worldName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Deposits a specified amount of money into an account in the specified world.
        Parameters:
        economy - The instance of the Economy service being used to handle the transaction.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the transaction.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account receiving the deposit.
        worldName - The name of the in-game world associated with the transaction.
        amount - The amount of money to deposit into the account.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the EconomyResponse, which provides details of the transaction outcome.

      • deposit

        public static CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String worldName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String currency,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Deposits a specified amount of currency into an account.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy system that will handle the transaction.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the deposit.
        accountID - The universally unique identifier (UUID) of the account where the deposit will be made.
        worldName - The name of the world in which the deposit transaction should occur.
        currency - The currency type in which the deposit amount is denominated.
        amount - The amount of currency to deposit into the account.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing the EconomyResponse, representing the result of the deposit operation.

      • createSharedAccount

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> createSharedAccount(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String name,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID owner)
        Creates a shared account within the specified economy provider.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance used to manage account operations. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the creation of the shared account. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier for the shared account being created. Must not be null.
        name - The display name of the shared account. Must not be null.
        owner - The unique identifier of the owner associated with the shared account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to a boolean indicating the success or failure of the shared account creation.

      • accountsWithOwnerOf

        public static CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithOwnerOf(@NotNull
                                                                @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Retrieves a list of account IDs that are owned by the same owner as the specified account ID.
        Parameters:
        economy - The Economy instance used to fetch account ownership details. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin for which the accounts are being queried. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account whose owner's other accounts are being retrieved. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a list of UUIDs representing the accounts owned by the same owner.

      • accountsWithMembershipTo

        public static CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithMembershipTo(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Retrieves a list of account IDs that have a membership to the specified plugin name for the given account ID.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance used to fetch the account membership data.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin for which membership data is being queried.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account for which memberships are being retrieved.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to a list of UUIDs representing account IDs with membership to the specified plugin.

      • accountsWithAccessTo

        public static CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithAccessTo(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 AccountPermission... permissions)
        Retrieves a list of account IDs that have been granted specific permissions to access a given account within the context of the specified plugin.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy system that manages account data and permissions
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the information
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account being accessed
        permissions - the set of permissions required to access the account
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing a list of UUIDs representing the accounts with the specified access

      • isAccountOwner

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountOwner(@NotNull
                                                        @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Checks if the specified UUID corresponds to the owner of the account identified by the given account ID.
        Parameters:
        economy - The Economy instance used to perform the account ownership check.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the account ownership verification.
        accountID - The UUID of the account to check ownership for.
        uuid - The UUID of the user to verify as the account owner.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a Boolean value; true if the user is the account owner, false otherwise.

      • setOwner

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> setOwner(@NotNull
                                                  @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                  @NotNull
                                                  @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                  @NotNull
                                                  @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                  @NotNull
                                                  @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Attempts to set an owner for a specified account in the provided economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy system where the ownership is to be set, must not be null
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the operation, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account, must not be null
        uuid - the unique identifier of the new owner, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the operation is successful, or false otherwise

      • isAccountMember

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Checks if a given UUID is a member of a specified account in the provided Economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance used to perform the membership check. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin performing the request. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check membership for. Must not be null.
        uuid - The unique identifier of the potential account member. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the UUID is a member of the account, or false otherwise.

      • addAccountMember

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Adds a member to an existing account in the economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The economy instance that manages account-related operations. Must not be null.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin invoking this method. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to which the member will be added. Must not be null.
        uuid - The unique identifier of the member to be added to the account. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the member is successfully added to the account, or false if the operation fails.

      • addAccountMember

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull UUID uuid,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          AccountPermission... initialPermissions)
        Adds a member to the specified account with the given permissions.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy system to execute the operation on, must not be null
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the operation, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to which the member is being added, must not be null
        uuid - the unique identifier of the member being added, must not be null
        initialPermissions - the set of initial permissions to assign to the member, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the member was successfully added, or false otherwise

      • removeAccountMember

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Removes a member from a specific account within the provided economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - The instance of the economy handler to perform the operation.
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the operation.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account from which the member should be removed.
        uuid - The unique identifier of the member to be removed from the account.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing a Boolean indicating the success or failure of the operation.

      • hasAccountPermission

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccountPermission(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID uuid,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull AccountPermission permission)
        Checks if a specific UUID has the given permission for the specified account under a plugin.
        Parameters:
        economy - the Economy instance used to check permissions
        pluginName - the name of the plugin for which the permission is being checked
        accountID - the UUID of the account being checked
        uuid - the UUID of the entity whose permissions are being verified
        permission - the specific account permission to check for
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing a Boolean indicating whether the UUID has the specified permission for the account

      • updateAccountPermission

        public static CompletableFuture<Boolean> updateAccountPermission(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull Economy economy,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID uuid,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull AccountPermission permission,
                                                                 boolean value)
        Updates the permission of a specific account in the economy system.
        Parameters:
        economy - the economy system instance used to update the account permission
        pluginName - the name of the plugin modifying the account permission
        accountID - the unique identifier of the target account
        uuid - the unique identifier of the entity (e.g., player) whose permission is being updated
        permission - the specific account permission to be updated
        value - the new value to assign to the permission (true or false)
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that, when completed, indicates whether the permission update was successful
